prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026 年计划小幅缩招（57→56）及本省物理类考生减少约 3.4%，在 2025 年基准 10738 名基础上预计竞争略有缓解；预测最低位次约 10575 名，区间 10075–11075 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 11433→11651→8162→17400→10738, with significant fluctuations; in 2023, due to factors such as a decrease in the provincial control line, the ranking moved sharply forward to 8162; in 2024, it moved significantly backward to 17400 (due to the rebound of the provincial control line and the first year of the new college entrance examination); in 2025, it returned to approximately 10738, with a fluctuation range of about 6600 in the past two years, and the 2025 baseline is about 10738; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 57 in 2021, 58 in 2022, 58 in 2023, 59 in 2024, and 57 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 56, a slight reduction of 1 compared to 2025, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has been around 48–62 in recent years, approximately 62nd in 2026, belonging to a strong engineering university with a stable level; the school's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; the popularity on Douyin platform is average, not in the top 100 nationally, with moderate application attention; the school is known for its petroleum and petrochemical characteristics, with petroleum and natural gas engineering, geological resources and geological engineering as traditional advantageous disciplines, but the fifth round of discipline evaluation data is not included in this system file and is not used for quantitative judgment.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to have high social popularity, while traditional majors like petroleum engineering and chemical engineering have stable popularity; in 2026, the number of physics category candidates in the province is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition; the school is located in Beijing, which has a certain regional appeal to Shanxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuations in historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (57→56), and the decrease of about 3.4% in the number of physics category candidates in the province, competition is expected to ease slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 10,738; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 10,575, with a range of 10,075–11,075.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 10,075–11,075, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is better than 10,075, you can focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors such as Petroleum Engineering (Carbon Neutral Energy Innovation Class) and Computer Science and Technology; if your ranking is around 10,575, focus on Tier 2 majors such as Mechanical Category, New Energy, and Energy Storage; if your ranking is close to 11,075, use Tier 3 majors as safety options.
